issues.detail: The instructions cover only a single error scenario and do not address other edge cases such as missing configuration or invalid input.

scenarios.name: Attach request_id to every log inside a request handler
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses structlog.contextvars.clear_contextvars and bind_contextvars in middleware so the request_id automatically threads through downstream log.info calls, while baseline manually passes request_id into each call.

scenarios.name: Pretty console logs in dev, JSON in production from one config
scenarios.rationale: Treatment selects ConsoleRenderer or JSONRenderer behind shared_processors and wires structlog.stdlib.ProcessorFormatter into a StreamHandler exactly as the skill prescribes, while baseline only swaps a basicConfig formatter.
